chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-450 of 2023 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag `A` 2. For hearing of CMA No.1947/2023 3. For hearing of main case 10-08-2023 M/s Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh and Irshad Nawaz Kalwar, Advocates for the Petitioner Mr. Bakhshan Khan Mahar, Advocate for Respondent No.5 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General a/w SIP / I.O Syed Aftab of Police Station Adilpur.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After hearing the parties, when this fact is revealed that the medical certificate of the injured has been challenged by the petitioner before the medical board and its report is awaited, we dispose of this petition, realizing that, in any case, after issuance of report of the Board, this petition would become infructuous. In case of a negative report, the case would be disposed of and in case of positive report, the challan would be submitted in the court and the petitioner would have a remedy before the trial court under the relevant provisions of law. And in case of disposal of the case on negative report, if the learned Magistrate does not agree with the opinion of the I.O and pass an adverse order, the petitioner would have an adequate remedy against such order before the relevant forum. Therefore, this petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Sulemen Khan/PA
